allow: PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/healthz" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Health check: $\($response | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "n8n health endpoint not reachable: $_" }; try { $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/settings" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Settings: $\($response | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 3\)" } catch { Write-Output "n8n settings endpoint not reachable: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/settings" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Headers:"; $response.Headers.GetEnumerator\(\) | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.Key\): $\($_.Value\)" } } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/node-types?search=PostgreSQL" -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output \($response | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 -Compress\) } catch { Write-Output "node-types endpoint: $_" }; try { $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/workflows" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Workflows count: $\($response.data.count\)" } catch { Write-Output "workflows endpoint: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/login" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Login page available" } catch { Write-Output "Login: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/credentials" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Credentials endpoint works without auth" } catch { Write-Output "Credentials: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/credential-types" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Credential types: $\($r.data.Count\) types" } catch { Write-Output "Credential types: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5678/healthz" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Headers.GetEnumerator\(\) | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "$\($_.Key\): $\($_.Value\)" } } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($homePath = $env:USERPROFILE; $possiblePaths = @\("$homePath\\.n8n", "$homePath\\n8n", "$homePath\\AppData\\Local\\n8n", "$homePath\\AppData\\Roaming\\n8n", "D:\\aiproject\\.n8n"\); foreach \($p in $possiblePaths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "=== $p ==="; Get-ChildItem $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize } })

PowerShell(docker inspect $\(docker ps --filter "ancestor=docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n" -q\) 2>&1 | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "=== Container: $\($_.Name\) ==="; Write-Output "Image: $\($_.Config.Image\)"; Write-Output "Env:"; $_.Config.Env | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $_" }; Write-Output "Volumes:"; $_.Mounts | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  Type=$\($_.Type\) Source=$\($_.Source\) Dest=$\($_.Destination\)" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $headers = @{ "X-N8N-API-KEY" = "n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563" }; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/workflows" -Headers $headers -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Workflows count: $\($r.data.count\)" } catch { Write-Output "Workflows: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/credentials" -Headers $headers -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Credentials count: $\($r.data.count\)" } catch { Write-Output "Credentials: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/healthz" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Health: $\($r.status\)" } catch { Write-Output "Health: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/workflows" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"="n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563"} -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($headers = @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"="n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563"}; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows" -Headers $headers -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "API v1 Workflows: $\($r.data.count\) workflows" } catch { Write-Output "v1 Workflows: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/credentials" -Headers $headers -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "API v1 Credentials: $\($r.data.count\) credentials" } catch { Write-Output "v1 Credentials: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/audit" -Headers $headers -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "API v1 Audit: OK" } catch { Write-Output "v1 Audit: $_" })

PowerShell($key = "n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563"; $headers1 = @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key}; $headers2 = @{"Authorization"="Bearer $key"}; $headers3 = @{"n8n-api-key"=$key}; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/workflows" -Headers $headers1 -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "X-N8N-API-KEY: OK, $\($r.data.count\) workflows" } catch { Write-Output "X-N8N-API-KEY: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/workflows" -Headers $headers2 -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Bearer: OK" } catch { Write-Output "Bearer: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/workflows" -Headers $headers3 -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "n8n-api-key: OK" } catch { Write-Output "n8n-api-key: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($key = "n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "v1 Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $r.Content } catch { $e = $_.Exception.Response; if \($e\) { Write-Output "Status: $\($e.StatusCode.value__\)"; $stream = $e.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { Write-Output "Error: $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/api-docs" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "API docs available" } catch { Write-Output "API docs: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api-docs" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "alt API docs available" } catch { Write-Output "alt API docs: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5678/docs/api" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "docs/api available" } catch { Write-Output "docs/api: $_" })

PowerShell(cd $env:TEMP; try { $result = node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); if \(!Database\) { console.log\('better-sqlite3 not found in local path'\); }" 2>&1; Write-Output $result } catch { Write-Output "Need to install sqlite" }; try { Add-Type -Path "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft SQLite\\sqlite3.dll" -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "SQLite available" } catch { Write-Output "No local SQLite" })

PowerShell($key = "n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563"; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/workflows" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "SUCCESS: Rest/workflows - $\($r.data.count\) workflows" } catch { Write-Output "rest/workflows: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "SUCCESS: API v1/workflows - $\($r.data.count\) workflows" } catch { Write-Output "api/v1/workflows: $_" })

PowerShell($key = "n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563"; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "SUCCESS! Workflows: $\($r.data.count\) workflows" } catch { Write-Output "Workflows: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/credentials" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "SUCCESS! Credentials: $\($r.data.count\)" } catch { Write-Output "Credentials: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/users" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "SUCCESS! Users: $\($r.data.count\)" } catch { Write-Output "Users: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/audit" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "SUCCESS! Audit accessible" } catch { Write-Output "Audit: $_" })

PowerShell($key = "n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563"; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "SUCCESS! Workflows: $\($r.data.count\) workflows"; $r.data | Select-Object id,name,active | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.id\): $\($_.name\) \(active=$\($_.active\)\)" } } catch { Write-Output "Workflows: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/credentials" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "SUCCESS! Credentials: $\($r.data.count\) credentials" } catch { Write-Output "Credentials: $_" })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem env: | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'N8N' } | Format-Table Name, Value -AutoSize)

PowerShell($key = "n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563"; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/settings" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Full settings: $\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "settings: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/node-types" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "node-types: OK, $\(if\($r.data\){$r.data.Count}else{'unknown'}\) types" } catch { Write-Output "node-types: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/node-types" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "v1 node-types: OK, $\(if\($r.data\){$r.data.Count}else{'unknown'}\) types" } catch { Write-Output "v1 node-types: $_" })

PowerShell($key = "n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563"; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/version" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Version: $\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "v1/version: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/version" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "rest/version: $\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "rest/version: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5678/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $h = $r.Headers; Write-Output "Root headers:"; $h.GetEnumerator\(\) | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.Key\): $\($_.Value\)" } } catch { Write-Output "root: $_" })

PowerShell($key = "n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563"; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/credentials" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "SUCCESS! Credentials: $\($r.data.count\)" } catch { Write-Output "Credentials: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/users" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "SUCCESS! Users: $\($r.data.count\)" } catch { Write-Output "Users: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/audit" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "SUCCESS! Audit accessible" } catch { Write-Output "Audit: $_" })

PowerShell($key = "n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/workflows" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "REST workflows status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { $e = $_.Exception.Response; if \($e\) { Write-Output "REST Status: $\($e.StatusCode.value__\)"; $stream = $e.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); Write-Output $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } else { Write-Output "Error: $_" } }; try { $headers = @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key; "Accept"="application/json"}; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/rest/workflows" -Headers $headers -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "REST with JSON accept: OK" } catch { Write-Output "REST JSON: $_" })

PowerShell($key = "n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563"; $endpoints = @\("/api/v1/nodes", "/rest/nodes", "/api/v1/custom-nodes", "/rest/community-packages", "/api/v1/community-packages"\); foreach \($ep in $endpoints\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678$ep" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "$ep : OK - $\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 2\)" } catch { Write-Output "$ep : $_" } })

PowerShell(try { $result = npx n8n-mcp --help 2>&1; Write-Output $result } catch { Write-Output "npx n8n-mcp error: $_" }; try { $result = npx n8n-mcp list-tools 2>&1; Write-Output "list-tools: $result" } catch { Write-Output "list-tools error: $_" })

PowerShell($key = "n8n_api_481bf81e7b834897ac76f9a223892b53ca336e46532f409b85e8b48321962563"; $endpoints = @\("/api/v1/tags", "/api/v1/variables", "/api/v1/executions", "/api/v1/workflows?limit=1"\); foreach \($ep in $endpoints\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678$ep" -Headers @{"X-N8N-API-KEY"=$key} -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "$ep : OK"; if \($r.data\) { Write-Output "  count: $\($r.data.count\)" } } catch { Write-Output "$ep : $_" } })

PowerShell(Write-Output "n8n version: 2.25.7"; Write-Output "`nChecking n8n public API version..."; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5678" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $html = $r.Content; if \($html -match 'version["\\s:]+\([^"<\\s]+\)'\) { Write-Output "HTML version match: $\($matches[1]\)" }; if \($html -match 'n8n@[\\d.]+'\) { Write-Output "n8n tag found: $\($matches[0]\)" } } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\XG\\AppData\\Roaming\\npm\\node_modules\\n8n-mcp" -Depth 1 | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer -or $_.Extension -match '\\.\(js|json|md\)$' } | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($gitBash = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe"; if \(Test-Path $gitBash\) { Write-Host "✅ Git Bash found: $gitBash"; & $gitBash --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1 } else { Write-Host "❌ Not found, searching..."; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Git" -Recurse -Filter "bash.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName })
